    server_name 3420b7d5.bluejund.com;
    server_tokens off;

    ssl_certificate /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/fullchain.pem;
    ssl_certificate_key /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/privkey.pem;
    include /etc/letsencrypt/options-ssl-nginx.conf;
    ssl_dhparam /etc/letsencrypt/ssl-dhparams.pem;

    location / {
        proxy_pass http://deployments-frontend-nginx-3420b7d5-1:80;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
    }
}

}

    server_tokens off;

    ssl_certificate_key /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/privkey.pem;

        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;

    server_name 3f6fcd49.bluejund.com;
    server_tokens off;

    location /.well-known/acme-challenge/ {
        root /var/www/certbot;
    }

    location / {
        return 301 https://$host$request_uri;
    }
}

server {
    listen 443 ssl;
    server_name 3f6fcd49.bluejund.com;
    server_tokens off;

    ssl_certificate /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/fullchain.pem;
    ssl_certificate_key /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/privkey.pem;
    include /etc/letsencrypt/options-ssl-nginx.conf;
    ssl_dhparam /etc/letsencrypt/ssl-dhparams.pem;

    location / {
        proxy_pass http://deployments-frontend-nginx-3f6fcd49-1:80;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
    }
}

    server_name 14bd1425.bluejund.com;
    server_tokens off;

    ssl_certificate /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/fullchain.pem;
    ssl_certificate_key /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/privkey.pem;
    include /etc/letsencrypt/options-ssl-nginx.conf;
    ssl_dhparam /etc/letsencrypt/ssl-dhparams.pem;

    location / {
        proxy_pass http://deployments-frontend-nginx-14bd1425-1:80;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
    }
}

server {
    listen 80;
    server_name 26a1975f.bluejund.com;
    server_tokens off;

    location /.well-known/acme-challenge/ {
        root /var/www/certbot;
    }

    location / {
        return 301 https://$host$request_uri;
    }
}

    server_name 26a1975f.bluejund.com;
    server_tokens off;

    ssl_certificate /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/fullchain.pem;
    ssl_certificate_key /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/privkey.pem;
    include /etc/letsencrypt/options-ssl-nginx.conf;
    ssl_dhparam /etc/letsencrypt/ssl-dhparams.pem;

    location / {
        proxy_pass http://deployments-frontend-nginx-26a1975f-1:80;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
    }
}

    ssl_certificate_key /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/privkey.pem;

    server_name 14bd1425.bluejund.com;
    server_tokens off;

    ssl_certificate /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/fullchain.pem;
    ssl_certificate_key /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/privkey.pem;
    include /etc/letsencrypt/options-ssl-nginx.conf;
    ssl_dhparam /etc/letsencrypt/ssl-dhparams.pem;

    location / {
        proxy_pass http://deployments-frontend-nginx-14bd1425-1:80;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
    }
}

    listen 443 ssl;
    server_name 14bd1425.bluejund.com;
    server_tokens off;

    ssl_certificate /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/fullchain.pem;
    ssl_certificate_key /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/privkey.pem;

    listen 443 ssl;
    server_name e7dc42a5.bluejund.com;
    server_tokens off;

    ssl_certificate /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/fullchain.pem;
    ssl_certificate_key /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/privkey.pem;

        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
    }
}

    server_name 26a1975f.bluejund.com;
    server_tokens off;

    ssl_certificate /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/fullchain.pem;
    ssl_certificate_key /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/privkey.pem;
    include /etc/letsencrypt/options-ssl-nginx.conf;
    ssl_dhparam /etc/letsencrypt/ssl-dhparams.pem;

    location / {
        proxy_pass http://deployments-frontend-nginx-26a1975f-1:80;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
    }
}

server {
    listen 80;
    server_name 3047a953.bluejund.com;
    server_tokens off;

    location /.well-known/acme-challenge/ {
        root /var/www/certbot;
    }

    location / {
        return 301 https://$host$request_uri;
    }
}

    server_name 53e1bd05.bluejund.com;
    server_tokens off;

    ssl_certificate /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/fullchain.pem;
    ssl_certificate_key /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/privkey.pem;
    include /etc/letsencrypt/options-ssl-nginx.conf;
    ssl_dhparam /etc/letsencrypt/ssl-dhparams.pem;

    location / {
        proxy_pass http://deployments-frontend-nginx-53e1bd05-1:80;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
    }
}

server {
    listen 80;
    server_name 5df46476.bluejund.com;
    server_tokens off;

    location /.well-known/acme-challenge/ {
        root /var/www/certbot;
    }

    location / {
        return 301 https://$host$request_uri;
    }
}

    server_name 6a99e748.bluejund.com;
    server_tokens off;

    location /.well-known/acme-challenge/ {
        root /var/www/certbot;
    }

    location / {
        return 301 https://$host$request_uri;
    }
}

server {
    listen 443 ssl;
    server_name 6a99e748.bluejund.com;
    server_tokens off;

    ssl_certificate /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/fullchain.pem;
    ssl_certificate_key /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/privkey.pem;
    include /etc/letsencrypt/options-ssl-nginx.conf;
    ssl_dhparam /etc/letsencrypt/ssl-dhparams.pem;

    location / {
        proxy_pass http://deployments-frontend-nginx-6a99e748-1:80;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
    }
}

    server_name 3420b7d5.bluejund.com;
    server_tokens off;

    location /.well-known/acme-challenge/ {
        root /var/www/certbot;
    }

    location / {
        return 301 https://$host$request_uri;
    }
}

server {
    listen 443 ssl;
    server_name 3420b7d5.bluejund.com;
    server_tokens off;

    ssl_certificate /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/fullchain.pem;
    ssl_certificate_key /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/privkey.pem;
    include /etc/letsencrypt/options-ssl-nginx.conf;
    ssl_dhparam /etc/letsencrypt/ssl-dhparams.pem;

    location / {
        proxy_pass http://deployments-frontend-nginx-3420b7d5-1:80;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
    }
}

    server_name 3420b7d5.bluejund.com;
    server_tokens off;

    ssl_certificate /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/fullchain.pem;
    ssl_certificate_key /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/privkey.pem;
    include /etc/letsencrypt/options-ssl-nginx.conf;
    ssl_dhparam /etc/letsencrypt/ssl-dhparams.pem;

    location / {
        proxy_pass http://deployments-frontend-nginx-3420b7d5-1:80;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
    }
}

server {
    listen 80;
    server_name 3f6fcd49.bluejund.com;
    server_tokens off;

    location /.well-known/acme-challenge/ {
        root /var/www/certbot;
    }

    location / {
        return 301 https://$host$request_uri;
    }
}

    listen 80;
    server_name 14bd1425.bluejund.com;
    server_tokens off;

    location /.well-known/acme-challenge/ {
        root /var/www/certbot;
    }

    location / {
        return 301 https://$host$request_uri;
    }
}

server {
    listen 443 ssl;
    server_name 14bd1425.bluejund.com;
    server_tokens off;

    ssl_certificate /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/fullchain.pem;
    ssl_certificate_key /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/privkey.pem;
    include /etc/letsencrypt/options-ssl-nginx.conf;
    ssl_dhparam /etc/letsencrypt/ssl-dhparams.pem;

    location / {
        proxy_pass http://deployments-frontend-nginx-14bd1425-1:80;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
    }
}

    server_name 4d200b62.bluejund.com;
    server_tokens off;

    ssl_certificate /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/fullchain.pem;
    ssl_certificate_key /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/privkey.pem;
    include /etc/letsencrypt/options-ssl-nginx.conf;
    ssl_dhparam /etc/letsencrypt/ssl-dhparams.pem;

    location / {
        proxy_pass http://deployments-frontend-nginx-4d200b62-1:80;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
    }
}

    server_name 26a1975f.bluejund.com;
    server_tokens off;

    ssl_certificate /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/fullchain.pem;
    ssl_certificate_key /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/privkey.pem;
    include /etc/letsencrypt/options-ssl-nginx.conf;
    ssl_dhparam /etc/letsencrypt/ssl-dhparams.pem;

    location / {
        proxy_pass http://deployments-frontend-nginx-26a1975f-1:80;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
    }
}

server {
    listen 80;
    server_name 3047a953.bluejund.com;
    server_tokens off;

    location /.well-known/acme-challenge/ {
        root /var/www/certbot;
    }

    location / {
        return 301 https://$host$request_uri;
    }
}

    server_name 5174eeae.bluejund.com;
    server_tokens off;

    location /.well-known/acme-challenge/ {
        root /var/www/certbot;
    }

    location / {
        return 301 https://$host$request_uri;
    }
}

server {
    listen 443 ssl;
    server_name 5174eeae.bluejund.com;
    server_tokens off;

    ssl_certificate /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/fullchain.pem;
    ssl_certificate_key /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/privkey.pem;
    include /etc/letsencrypt/options-ssl-nginx.conf;
    ssl_dhparam /etc/letsencrypt/ssl-dhparams.pem;

    location / {
        proxy_pass http://deployments-frontend-nginx-5174eeae-1:80;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
    }
}

server {
    listen 443 ssl;
    server_name 14bd1425.bluejund.com;
    server_tokens off;

    ssl_certificate /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/fullchain.pem;
    ssl_certificate_key /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/privkey.pem;
    include /etc/letsencrypt/options-ssl-nginx.conf;
    ssl_dhparam /etc/letsencrypt/ssl-dhparams.pem;

    location / {
        proxy_pass http://deployments-frontend-nginx-14bd1425-1:80;

        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;

}

    ssl_certificate /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/fullchain.pem;
    ssl_certificate_key /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/privkey.pem;
    include /etc/letsencrypt/options-ssl-nginx.conf;
    ssl_dhparam /etc/letsencrypt/ssl-dhparams.pem;

    location / {
        proxy_pass http://deployments-frontend-nginx-df8f00bf-1:80;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
    }
}

server {
    listen 80;
    server_name bluejund.com;
    server_tokens off;

    location /.well-known/acme-challenge/ {
        root /var/www/certbot;
    }

    location / {
        return 301 https://$host$request_uri;
    }
}

    listen 443 ssl;
    server_name bluejund.com;
    server_tokens off;

    server_tokens off;

    server_name 3047a953.bluejund.com;
    server_tokens off;

    location /.well-known/acme-challenge/ {
        root /var/www/certbot;
    }

    location / {
        return 301 https://$host$request_uri;
    }
}

server {
    listen 443 ssl;
    server_name 3047a953.bluejund.com;
    server_tokens off;

    ssl_certificate /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/fullchain.pem;
    ssl_certificate_key /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/privkey.pem;
    include /etc/letsencrypt/options-ssl-nginx.conf;
    ssl_dhparam /etc/letsencrypt/ssl-dhparams.pem;

    location / {
        proxy_pass http://deployments-frontend-nginx-3047a953-1:80;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
    }
}

    listen 443 ssl;
    server_name 14bd1425.bluejund.com;
    server_tokens off;

    ssl_certificate /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/fullchain.pem;
    ssl_certificate_key /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/privkey.pem;

    server_name 3047a953.bluejund.com;
    server_tokens off;

    ssl_certificate /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/fullchain.pem;
    ssl_certificate_key /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/privkey.pem;
    include /etc/letsencrypt/options-ssl-nginx.conf;
    ssl_dhparam /etc/letsencrypt/ssl-dhparams.pem;

    location / {
        proxy_pass http://deployments-frontend-nginx-3047a953-1:80;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
    }
}

server {
    listen 80;
    server_name 3420b7d5.bluejund.com;
    server_tokens off;

    location /.well-known/acme-challenge/ {
        root /var/www/certbot;
    }

    location / {
        return 301 https://$host$request_uri;
    }
}

    listen 80;
    server_name 3047a953.bluejund.com;
    server_tokens off;

    location /.well-known/acme-challenge/ {
        root /var/www/certbot;
    }

    location / {
        return 301 https://$host$request_uri;
    }
}

server {
    listen 443 ssl;
    server_name 3047a953.bluejund.com;
    server_tokens off;

    ssl_certificate /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/fullchain.pem;
    ssl_certificate_key /etc/letsencrypt/live/bluejund.com/privkey.pem;
    include /etc/letsencrypt/options-ssl-nginx.conf;
    ssl_dhparam /etc/letsencrypt/ssl-dhparams.pem;

    location / {
        proxy_pass http://deployments-frontend-nginx-3047a953-1:80;
        proxy_set_header Host $host;
        proxy_set_header X-Real-IP $remote_addr;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-For $proxy_add_x_forwarded_for;
        proxy_set_header X-Forwarded-Proto $scheme;
    }
}
